title: Training Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Training Techniques inside Evaluation Metrics by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Perfect Model
steps.summary: Perfect Model belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Training Techniques. Compare it with Preferential Attachment Model and Risk-coverage curves. It opens into Perfect Recall and Perfect Precision.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Preferential Attachment Model
steps.summary: Preferential Attachment Model belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Training Techniques. Compare it with Risk-coverage curves and Perfect Model. It opens into Geometric Preferential Attachment.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Risk-coverage curves
steps.summary: Risk-coverage curves belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Training Techniques. Compare it with Preferential Attachment Model and Perfect Model.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
